task_completion.description: Agent placed two distinct measurements for the intrahepatic and infrarenal levels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 3D Slicer interface show at least two distinct measurement lines (rulers) placed on the abdominal CT scan.

task_completion.description: Measurements are correctly located on the Inferior Vena Cava (IVC).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement lines are placed across the IVC (a large vein typically located anterior to the spine and to the right of the aorta in the axial view).
The measurement value for the intrahepatic level (the more superior/upper measurement) shown in the 3D Slicer UI or the saved ivc_measurements.mrk.json file is approximately 22.0 mm.
The measurement value for the infrarenal level (the more inferior/lower measurement) shown in the 3D Slicer UI or the saved ivc_measurements.mrk.json file is approximately 18.0 mm.

task_completion.description: The report file contains all required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'ivc_report.json' is visible in a text editor or terminal, containing exactly these keys: intrahepatic_diameter_mm, infrarenal_diameter_mm, classification, morphology, and clinical_interpretation.

task_completion.description: The classification field contains a valid assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'classification' field in the ivc_report.json file contains a valid clinical classification of the IVC status (e.g., 'normal').

task_completion.description: The morphology field contains a valid assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'morphology' field in the ivc_report.json file contains a valid morphological description (e.g., 'normal', 'slit-like', 'plethoric').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to perform the measurements rather than just creating the output files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the 3D Slicer interface with active measurement tools (rulers/lines) on the CT scan, not just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the report values correspond to the actual measurements taken in the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement values in the ivc_report.json file match the values shown on the measurement lines in the 3D Slicer GUI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent saved the files to the exact requested directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands or file explorer windows show the files saved specifically in ~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Inferior Vena Cava (IVC) corresponds to label 9 in the AMOS 2022 dataset. For this specific case, the ground truth intrahepatic diameter is 22.0 mm and the infrarenal diameter is 18.0 mm. A 'normal' IVC classification and morphology is expected for these measurements.
